mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.real_name as create_by_name FROM marketing m LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.create_by = u.id ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
SELECT m.*, u.real_name as create_by_name FROM marketing m LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.create_by = u.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM marketing WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM marketing WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM marketing WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE marketing SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, description = #{description}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, rules = #{rules}, product_ids = #{productIds}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
